member.office_address: 2455 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-3511

form_analysis.form_header_text: Rep. Shontel Brown: FY27 General Programmatic and Language Request Form
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: The deadline to submit FY27 forms will be Friday, March 6, 2026 at 11:59PM. Please use this form to submit all General Programmatic and Language requests. If you require any additional assistance, please email brownoh11.appropriations@mail.house.gov and Julia.Rossman@mail.house.gov. Any information provided on General Programmatic and Language request forms will become publicly available on this website in order to comply with House Appropriations Committee and congressional ethics requirements. If you are submitting a request for Community Project Funding (CPF), do not use this form. Please use the form corresponding to the appropriate subcommittee.

sections.description: Information about the individual and organization submitting this request.

fields.label: Requesting Organization Staff Contact Email
fields.help_text: Official email address for the staff member in charge of the request.

fields.label: Requesting Staff Contact Phone
fields.help_text: Phone number for the primary staff contact.

sections.description: Specific details regarding the fiscal year funding or language request.

fields.label: Appropriations Bill
fields.help_text: The subcommittee jurisdiction for this request.
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Constructions, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
National Security and Department of State
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA's Science Mission Directorate is funded through the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS) Appropriations bill, as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Agency (e.g. HUD, DOD, USDA)
fields.help_text: The federal agency overseeing the program.
fields.rationale: The target agency is the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA).

fields.label: Account (e.g. NIH - NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF NEUROLOGICAL DISORDERS AND STROKE, HRSA - Bureau of Health Workforce)
fields.help_text: The specific account within the agency.
fields.rationale: The account name corresponds to NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Federal Program Name/Title (if Applicable) (e.g. HRSA - Bureau of Health Workforce - Behavioral Health Workforce Education and Training).
fields.help_text: The title of the federal program.
fields.rationale: This is the specific directorate name within the NASA Science account.

fields.label: FY2027 Funding Level (if you are not requesting funding, please write N/A)
fields.help_text: The requested dollar amount for the upcoming fiscal year.
fields.rationale: Based on the specific funding ask provided in the context to support NASA Science programs nationally and locally in OH-11.

fields.label: Was funding requested in the President's Budget Request for FY27? If so, at what level?
fields.help_text: Information regarding the administration's budget proposal for this program.
fields.draft_value: Currently unknown (President's Budget Request has not been released)
fields.rationale: Reference data indicates the FY2027 President's Budget Request has not been released.

fields.label: Bill Language Request (if you are not requesting bill language, please write N/A)
fields.help_text: Text for inclusion in the legislative bill.
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that bill language is not requested (N/A).

fields.label: Report Language Request (if you are not requesting report language, please write N/A)
fields.help_text: Text for inclusion in the committee report accompanying the bill.
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that report language is not requested (N/A).

fields.label: Ohio-11 Connection (if there is none, please write N/A)*
fields.help_text: Describe the relationship of the request to Ohio's 11th Congressional District.
fields.draft_value:
* Over $96.4 million in NASA Science obligations (FY23-FY25) support critical operations at NASA Glenn Research Center and local academic institutions.
* Over $230 million in active contracts with Alcyon Technical Services (ATS) Jv, LLC for logistics and infrastructure sustaining NASA Glenn.
* Case Western Reserve University holds over $8 million in active grants for cosmology and cryogenic research vital to national space science goals.
* Cleveland State University receives NASA funding to monitor Great Lakes water quality and predict harmful algal blooms using satellite data.
fields.rationale: Cites specific spending data for OH-11 including the $96.4M total, major contract totals for ATS Jv LLC, and academic grant work at Case Western and Cleveland State.

fields.label: Request Description
fields.help_text: A narrative description of the programmatic or language request.
fields.draft_value:
* $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to restore stability after the disruptions of FY 2026 and ensure continued U.S. leadership in space.
* Sustains the workforce of thousands of civil servants and contractors whose highly specialized skills are essential for planetary defense and exploration.
* Enables NASA to execute decadal survey priorities, providing a rigorous, peer-reviewed path toward breakthroughs in our understanding of the solar system.
* Strengthens American competitiveness by ensuring the U.S. continues to set the norms for space exploration as other nations, like China, accelerate their ambitions.
fields.rationale: Provides the $9B funding target and uses advocacy talking points regarding workforce stability, decadal survey priorities, and international competition.
